specializations: Conditioning agents for hair and scalp
product_highlights: MARITECH BRIGHT — clinically proven marine-derived brightening active
Specialty conditioning agents for wet and dry combability
Scalp health actives for microbiome balance
Comprehensive formulation support for hair care
notes: Innospec Performance Chemicals is a global manufacturer of specialty ingredients for personal care with a strong focus on conditioning and scalp health. Their MARITECH BRIGHT ingredient is a clinically proven skin brightening active derived from marine biotechnology. Innospec's conditioning agents are widely used in shampoos and conditioners to improve wet and dry combability, reduce static, and enhance shine, with a comprehensive formulation support service available to customers.
